title: RBI imposes monetary penalty on Maanaveeya Development & Finance Private Limited
description: The Reserve Bank of India (RBI) has, by an order dated February 27, 2026, imposed a monetary penalty of ₹3.10 lakh (Rupees Three Lakh Ten Thousand only) on Maanaveeya Development & Finance Private Limited (the company) for non-compliance with certain directions issued by RBI on 'Governance'. This penalty has been imposed in exercise of powers conferred on RBI under section 58G(1)(b) read with section 58B(5)(aa) of the Reserve Bank of India Act, 1934. The correspondence pertaining to th
